title: PP Glitter Mesh Roll, Metallic Foil Mesh Ribbon, Glitter Tulle Fabric Roll for DIY Crafts Gift Wrapping, 26cmx10 Yards, Champagne
features: What You Get: The package includes 1 roll of metallic foil mesh ribbon. The width is 26cm, and the length is 10 yards.
Material: Made of polypropylene and metal foil, safe to use, soft, wear-resistant, not easy to break, and can be used for a long time.
Wide Application: Glitter mesh roll is suitable for crafts, gift wrapping, bottle, scrapbook, hair bow, flower project, packaging, clothing, party or home decorations, etc.
Easy to Use: Glitter tulle fabric roll can be cut into any length and shape according to your needs. Glitter surface makes it look more elegant and generous.
Many Colors: We have many different colors can be choose, including white/silver, white/gold, white/colorful, light pink, light purple,light blue,red,red/green,gold,burgundy,green,champagne.
description: PP Glitter Mesh Roll, Metallic Foil Mesh Ribbon, Glitter Tulle Fabric Roll for DIY Crafts Gift Wrapping, 26cmx10 Yards, Champagne
